prompt: Insert instances of the rod-shaped bacterium from the reference image into the tissue in the source image.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, which displays pink tissue under a microscope. Insert multiple instances of the rod-shaped bacteria visible in image 2 into this tissue. The inserted bacteria should adopt the purple-stained appearance and morphology of the bacteria from image 2, and be realistically dispersed within or on the tissue, maintaining a photorealistic microscopic view.
objects: Bacteria dispersed within or on the tissue
